General.Name: B.V. Delftsch Aardewerkfabriek "De Porceleyne Fles Anno 1653"
General.Description: B.V. Delftsch Aardewerkfabriek De Porceleyne Fles Anno 1653 designs, produces and sells Delft Blue decorative pottery and modern pottery products in the Netherlands. It also operates a real estate portfolio business. B.V. Delftsch Aardewerkfabriek De Porceleyne Fles Anno 1653 was founded in 1653 and is headquartered in Delft, the Netherlands.
